theme: Cockpit UX polish — turn the presenter cockpit (rext demo-stack/cockpit.py, a stdlib-Python static-HTML server on :7700+offset) from a dark utilitarian panel into a slick LIGHT professional login launcher. Five fills, all render-accepted on a live demo-3 (:37700) + USER-APPROVED the design: (1) light restyle — _PAGE_CSS rewritten to a clean light high-contrast design (CSS custom props, card-per-hero, indigo accent, subtle shadows/hover); (2) FontAwesome icons via the FREE cdnjs CDN <link> (fa-circle-user per hero, fa-building per org, fa-arrow-right-to-bracket on the CTA, fa-download in the footer); (3) CTA unification — dropped [Jump to section], ONE [Log in as] per hero routed to the hero's resolved jump_to (reuses cockpit.go's defaultJumpForVantage — no cockpit.go change); (4) seed-manifest download — footer link -> /manifest.json served with Content-Disposition: attachment (pretty JSON); (5) staged login-progress overlay — Signing you in… -> Loading your workspace… -> Almost there… with localStorage in-flight state (30s window) across the FAPI-handshake redirect (generous final stage). Tooling + docs only — ZERO next-web / platform-repo edits; the cockpit stays a standalone served panel.
